title: education-atlas: a data-grounded map of educational problems by country and level (against UN SDG 4)
description: education-atlas ingests the world's authoritative education statistics into one normalized, validated, provenanced dataset and identifies educational problems by country and level, measured against UN Sustainable Development Goal 4 (Quality Education) benchmarks. This release reconciles 78,000+ observations across 219 countries, 30 indicators, and 9 problem categories (access, completion, learning outcomes, equity, financing, teachers, infrastructure, skills/NEET, digital divide) over all education levels (pre-primary, primary, lower/upper secondary, tertiary, TVET, adult literacy), drawn from World Bank EdStats, UNESCO UIS, Our World in Data, and OECD PISA 2022. Every observation carries source, source URL, and as-of provenance. A connector framework, a 14-check validation suite, a 0-100 problem-severity scoring engine (vs SDG 4 benchmarks, income-peer medians, and trend), and the founding synthesis report 'The Global Education Problem Landscape' are included. This is Bucket Foundation's founding research for its education-reform mission. MIT licensed (code); CC-BY-4.0 (data).
